---
name: logo-conversion
description: Convert app logos to Runtipi's 512x512 JPG format.
argument-hint: 'App name, GitHub logo URL, or "convert [APP_NAME]"'
---

# Logo Conversion

Convert logos to a centered 512x512 JPG with sensible background contrast.

Rules:
- Follow [AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md)
- Keep margins around 15-20%
- Use a dark background for light transparent logos and a light background for dark transparent logos
